decisions_made: Rollback leaves the current Forge product line completely instead of being replaced with a compatibility alias.
Default install snapshots must move under runtime-managed Forge state roots instead of repo-local .install-backups.
The repo bump tooling classifies this release as a minor bump, so the stable line moves from 2.14.5 to 2.15.0.
risks: Real installed host smoke after the version bump was not rerun; confidence rests on repo and dist verification gates.
